---
title: "Chen Gao"
pagetitle: "Chen Gao — Economics, Peking University & LSE CFM"
image: img/profile.svg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:chengao0716@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ChennoShen239
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: files/cv.pdf
---

I am a senior undergraduate at the [National School of Development](https://en.nsd.pku.edu.cn/), Peking University. In Fall 2026, I will join the [Centre for Macroeconomics](https://www.lse.ac.uk/CFM) at the London School of Economics as a research assistant.

My research interests lie in **macroeconomics**, **monetary economics**, and **computational methods**, with a particular focus on heterogeneity. I enjoy combining structural modeling with data-driven approaches.

## Education

- **B.A. in Economics**, Peking University, 2022–2026 (with Honors)
- **Visiting Undergraduate**, University of California, Berkeley, Spring 2025
